resources.string: What should I be mindful of today?
How can I improve my focus and productivity?
What\'s a good time for important decisions?
What does my chart say about relationships?
Hello! I\'m Destiny, your personal astrology guide. Ask me anything about your life, relationships, career, or any other area where you seek cosmic guidance.
You will be signed out. Your data will be saved for when you sign in again.
As a guest, your birth data will be deleted. Sign in with Apple or Google to save your data.
App will restart with your selected language
Sign in to save your birth chart and chats
By continuing, you agree to our
Enter your birth details to generate your chart and personalize your insights
Enter partner details to explore relationship and marriage compatibility
Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
Multiple active subscriptions detected. Please manage your subscriptions in Google Play.
Could not restore purchases. Please try again.
Your purchase is pending approval. We will activate your subscription as soon as it completes.
Start asking questions and your history will appear here.
Without an exact birth time, the quality of insights may be affected
Google Sign-In is not configured for this build. Please use another sign-in method.
Google Sign-In failed (code %1$d). Please try again.
No Google accounts found. Add one to your device and try again.
Google Sign-In failed. Please try again.
Sign in with Apple is not yet available on Android. Please use Google or continue as guest.
This account was created with Apple and can only be accessed from the iOS app. Please contact support@destinyaiastrology.com for assistance.
I don\'t know my birth time
Help improve Destiny AI by sharing anonymised usage
Help us improve Destiny by sharing anonymized usage analytics. You can change this anytime in Settings.
Your profile was updated from the cloud
Your profile data was refreshed on the server. Please re-enter your birth details.
This account has been permanently deleted and can no longer be used. The email associated with this account cannot be reused. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
Sign in failed. Please try again.
Your birth data is already linked to your Apple account. Please sign in with Apple.
Your birth data is already linked to your Google account. Please sign in with Google.
Your birth data is already linked to %@. Please sign in with Google.
Your birth data is already linked to %@. Please sign in with that account.
This account was upgraded to %@. Please sign in.
You already have a registered account. Please sign in.
An account already exists with your birth data. Please sign in with Apple to continue.
An account already exists with your birth data. Please sign in with Google (%@).
An account already exists with your birth data. Please sign in with Google.
An account already exists with your birth data. Please sign in with %@.
An account already exists with your birth data. Please sign in.
Apple sign-in is not available on Android. Please use Google or sign in on the iOS app.
Daily limit reached. Resets at midnight.
Your name and gender have been updated.
For changes to your date, time, or place of birth, please contact our support team. This ensures accuracy in your astrological readings.
Detailed explanation for %@ will appear here.
Detailed explanation for %1$s will appear here.
Mars is in its own sign (Aries or Scorpio)
Mars is in a fixed sign
Mars is in its own Navamsa
Mars is conjunct with benefic planets
Mars is in a benefic nakshatra
Mars is in an auspicious nakshatra
Mars and Moon are in friendly nakshatras
Mars is in Ascendant lord\'s nakshatra
Mars and Moon share the same nakshatra pada
Mars and Moon in mutual Kendra relationship
Mars receives aspects from benefic planets
Mars and Jupiter in mutual aspect
Mars and Jupiter in trine houses
Moon is strong in the chart
Mars is combust (too close to Sun)
Mars is Yoga Karaka for this Lagna
Mars is well-placed in D7 (Saptamsa) chart
Mars is well-placed in D9 (Navamsa) chart
Mars is well-placed in D10 (Dasamsa) chart
Mars is well-placed in D60 (Shashtiamsa) chart
Chandra Mangala Yoga (Mars-Moon wealth yoga) present
Mars is well-placed in D24 (Chaturvimsamsa) chart
Aligning the cosmos just for you...
Save partner profiles for quick matching
Sign in to continue asking questions
Sign in to unlock compatibility matching
Sign in to view subscription plans
Sign in to switch between profiles
Sign in to save and manage profiles
Create an account to keep going and save your progress
This birth data is already registered. Please sign in to continue.
You must be at least 13 years old to create an account
Your match history will appear here
Calculate compatibility with partners to build your history
Your primary account profile cannot be modified. To update your birth details, please contact support@destinyaiastrology.com.
Your primary account profile cannot be deleted. For assistance, please contact support@destinyaiastrology.com.
This birth chart is currently active. Please switch to a different profile first, or contact support@destinyaiastrology.com for assistance.
This birth chart has been used for readings and cannot be modified. For assistance, contact support@destinyaiastrology.com.
This birth chart has been used for readings and cannot be deleted. For assistance, contact support@destinyaiastrology.com.
A birth chart with similar details already exists. Each person can only have one chart. For assistance, contact support@destinyaiastrology.com.
No combinations found for this category.
Both charts are free from the Serpent Curse. This indicates a natural balance and fewer karmic obstacles in your journey together.
Since both charts have Kalsarpa Dosha, the intensity is balanced. This mutual presence often cancels out the negative effects, leading to a unique shared destiny.
Mutual Cancellation: Since both partners have Mangal Dosha, they neutralize each other\'s effects.
Confers leadership, royal comforts, political success, and widespread respect.
Benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury) in the 6th, 7th, and 8th from Moon.
Bestows unblemished reputation and ethical prosperity through virtuous deeds.
Natural benefic in 10th from Lagna or Moon.
Grants perpetual, undiminishing wealth maintained across generations.
Strong unafflicted 2nd and 11th lords in mutual support.
Divine incarnation qualities; the individual carries a special spiritual mission or purpose.
Venus in Kendra from Lagna lord, Jupiter in Trikona.
Complete absence of progeny; adoption or spiritual sublimation of parental instincts.
5th lord, Jupiter, and 5th house all severely afflicted.
Bestows good physique, strong character, and comfortable lifestyle free from major adversity.
Planet (excl. Sun/Rahu/Ketu) in 12th house from Moon.
Serious eye-related health concerns; early and regular intervention critical.
Significant vision challenges; prioritize eye health and preventive measures.
Vulnerability to progressive vision loss; ophthalmological care recommended.
Venus and 2nd lord weakened with malefic aspects (var. 2).
Physical challenges or disability; overcoming bodily limitations requires determination.
Malefics in Lagna with Lagna lord afflicted in Dusthana.
Generous food donor; the individual feeds others and is known for charitable hospitality.
2nd lord in Kendra/Trikona with Jupiter\'s aspect.
Indicates prosperity in later life (55+ years); retirement brings comfort.
Wealth significators activate during later Dasha periods.
Indicates risk of notoriety or damaged reputation; mindful conduct is essential.
Malefic influences on Lagna and 10th house.
Childlessness or extreme difficulty in having progeny; remedial measures advised.
5th lord and Jupiter severely afflicted in Dusthana.
Tendency toward untruthfulness or exaggeration; conscious honesty practice needed.
Mercury afflicted with malefics in 2nd house.
Property acquisition without effort — through inheritance, gifts, or fortunate deals.
Effortless acquisition of homes and real estate through favorable circumstances.
Benefic influence on 4th house from strong planets (var. 2).
Bestows effortless wealth — windfall, inheritance, or fortunate opportunities.
2nd lord in 11th or vice versa, with Jupiter/Venus aspects.
Multiple significant relationships or strong attraction from opposite sex; magnetic romantic presence.
Lagna lord and 7th lord in conjunction or mutual aspect.
Ensures acquisition of diverse assets and wealth from multiple sources throughout life.
Multiple wealth-significators in strong mutual positions.
Blessed with many children who bring joy and family continuity.
5th lord strong in Kendra/Trikona with Jupiter\'s aspect (var. 1).
Multiple progeny with good health and character; family grows.
Jupiter and 5th lord in mutual support with benefic connections (var. 2).
Grants early financial advantage through family wealth or inheritance.
Wealth significators active from birth through early Dasha.
Risk of confinement, imprisonment, or involuntary restriction of freedom.
Lagna lord and 6th lord connected with Saturn/Rahu.
Grants respect and affection from family and relatives; individual is a family anchor.
4th lord in benefic position with benefic aspects and Mercury in Lagna.
Strengthens family bonds and brings honor through kinship and trusted counsel.
Jupiter connected to 4th house through aspect or occupation.
Indicates estrangement from relatives and potential family conflicts or isolation.
Malefic affliction to 4th house and lord with no benefic support.
Bestows sharp intellect, eloquent speech, business acumen, and excellence in analytical professions.
Mercury in a Kendra (1/4/7/10) in own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exaltation (Virgo).
Intense, passionate romantic life with heightened physical magnetism and intimate fulfillment.
Venus and 7th lord in specific combinations indicating physical attraction.
Exceptional fortune, luck, and divine grace; blessed with timely opportunities.
9th lord strong in Kendra/Trikona with benefic influences.
Grants exceptional scholarship, eloquence, fame in learning, and mastery of arts and sciences.
Navamsa lord of 2nd/5th/11th lord is exalted and conjoined with 9th lord.
Trust issues in marriage; transparency and emotional connection should be prioritized.
Venus and 7th house afflictions indicating infidelity.
Solar-like brilliance in learning; illuminates others through teaching.
Mercury in 2nd from Sun, Moon in 11th, Jupiter in Trikona from Mercury.
Drum-like fame; prosperity, courage, enduring reputation, and royal status.
Venus, Jupiter, and Lagna lord in mutual Kendras from 9th lord.
Enjoys fine food, culinary pleasures, and a comfortable dining lifestyle.
2nd lord strong with benefic aspects on the 2nd house.
Wealth through siblings, courage, or communication; siblings aid prosperity.
Financial gains through sibling partnerships or collaborative ventures.
Sibling\'s curse affecting progeny; unresolved fraternal karma impacts children.
Mars afflicted with 5th lord in malefic combinations.
Grants profound wisdom, scholarly pursuits, and divine protection in knowledge-based professions.
Benefics in Kendras from 5th and 11th lords with specific requirements.
Slow learning or intellectual dullness; extra effort needed to grasp complex concepts.
Saturn afflicting Mercury and 5th house, no benefic relief.
Mature intellect beyond one\'s years; wisdom, analytical depth, and scholarly temperament.
Mercury and Jupiter in mutual Kendra, 5th lord strong.
Intellectual brilliance combined with leadership; brilliant communicator with executive ability.
Mercury conjoined with Sun in same house.
Mercurial intelligence — quick wit, mathematical skill, and commercial proficiency.
Mercury strong in Kendra with benefic aspects connected to 5th.
Fierce determination and divine protection in leadership roles.
Lagna lord exalted aspecting Moon, Jupiter in Kendra.
Creates emotional intensity and impulsive tendencies. May bring gains through unconventional means but causes relationship friction.
Moon and Mars in conjunction (same house).
Confers royal comforts, prosperity, truthful courage, and dignified social position.
Lagna lord exalted, 4th and 10th lords in mutual exchange.
Grants fame, prosperity, and an influential life known across regions.
All four Kendra houses (1/4/7/10) occupied by planets.
Periods of financial hardship; careful planning and remedial measures advisable.
Financial drain through partnerships, legal issues, or overexpenditure.
Lagna-12th lord exchange with 7th lord aspects.
Income instability and difficulty saving wealth.
Poverty through wasteful spending or unfortunate financial decisions.
Financial struggles due to family obligations or inherited debts.
Loss of wealth through enemies, litigation, or health expenses.
Difficulty maintaining stable employment or consistent income.
Poverty due to lack of initiative or motivation in financial matters.
Financial losses through speculation or risky ventures.
Chronic financial challenges requiring disciplined money management.
Financial ruin through external circumstances beyond personal control.
Happiness through adopted children or non-biological heirs.
5th lord connected to 8th/12th with Saturn\'s involvement (var. 1).
Family expansion through adoption; adopted child brings fulfillment.
Chronic bodily discomfort, physical suffering, or persistent health complaints.
Lagna lord in Dusthana with malefic aspects, no benefic relief.
Well-developed physique, exceptional stamina, and physical vitality.
Mars and Lagna lord strong with Jupiter\'s aspect.
Robust body, healthy appetite, and strong digestive system.
Jupiter and Moon in positions indicating well-nourished constitution.
Divine favor and lordship; treated like royalty with benevolent authority.
Lagna lord in 9th, 9th lord in Kendra, aspected by benefics.
Ensures steady income and wealth accumulation through professional channels.
2nd and 11th lords in mutual Kendra or Trikona positions.
Grants personal wealth through individual effort and enterprise.
Lagna lord connected with 2nd and 11th lords via conjunction or aspect.
Bestows fortune through speculation, inheritance, or past-life merit.
5th and 9th lords connected with 2nd and 11th lords.
Creates consistent wealth flow from multiple sources throughout life.
Benefics in 2nd and 11th houses with strong dignity.
Amplifies earning potential and substantial asset accumulation.
2nd lord exalted or in own sign, connected to 11th house.
Ensures gains from professional networks, associations, and social connections.
11th lord in Kendra or Trikona with benefic aspects.
Grants wealth through paternal lineage, luck, and righteous earnings.
9th and Lagna lords in mutual connection with 2nd house support.
Creates exceptional capacity for wealth generation and financial management.
Strong 2nd and 11th houses with lords in dignified positions.
Bestows wealth through intelligence, speculation, and creative ventures.
2nd, 5th, and 11th lords interconnected via aspect or conjunction.
Grants wealth on ethical foundations; prosperity through righteous means.
Jupiter aspecting or conjoining 2nd and 11th lords.
Brings wealth through luxury, arts, entertainment, or beauty industries.
Venus connected to 2nd and 11th houses with strong dignity.
Indicates challenges in nurturing relationships and expressing familial affection.
Specific planetary afflictions to Lagna lord and 4th house.
Grants generous disposition, wealth, conveyances, and philanthropic nature.
Planets (excl. Sun/Rahu/Ketu) in both 2nd and 12th from Moon.
Career-related financial difficulties; effort fails to convert to proportional income.
Indicates unnatural or difficult end of life; spiritual practices provide protection.
Multiple malefics in Kendras/Marakas with no benefic intervention.
Unattractive facial features or dental issues; cosmetic and health care advisable.
Malefics in 2nd house afflicting facial appearance (var. 1).
Unpleasant appearance or chronic facial health issues.
Moon and 2nd lord afflicted by malefics (var. 2).
One child who is exceptionally devoted and successful; quality over quantity.
Immense prosperity, philanthropy, and dignified, elephant-like authority.
Strong 9th and 10th lords with benefic aspects.
Confers intelligence, eloquence, lasting reputation, and virtuous, wealthy character.
Jupiter in a Kendra (1/4/7/10) from Moon.
Hearing impairment or ear-related health problems; auditory care needed.
Malefics in 3rd and 11th houses afflicting Mercury.
Celestial artistic talent; excellence in music, dance, performing arts, and creative expression.
10th lord in Kama Trikona with Venus strong and Moon in Trikona.
Eagle-like vision; destroys adversaries and rises above competition.
Moon strong with Jupiter and 9th lord benefic aspects.
Bestows beauty, virtue, refined character, maternal grace, and domestic happiness.
9th lord and Moon in own/exalted signs in Kendra/Trikona; or Navamsa lord of 10th lord exalted in 10th with Lagna lord.
Prosperity through agriculture, land, or nurturing enterprises.
Jupiter in Trikona, Lagna lord in benefic Navamsa.
Cruel tendencies toward animals; karmic consequences from violent actions against creatures.
Mars and Rahu afflicting specific houses with no benefic protection.
Spiritual wholeness and cosmic understanding; the individual perceives universal truths.
Specific planetary configuration creating spherical completeness.
Loss of property through unfortunate events or legal disputes.
4th lord afflicted by malefics in Dusthana (var. 1).
Destruction or forced sale of property; housing instability.
Susceptibility to private health issues affecting intimate life; preventive care advised.
Malefic affliction to Venus, 7th and 8th houses.
Bestows exceptional wisdom, moral integrity, spiritual inclinations, and a respected position in society.
Jupiter in a Kendra (1/4/7/10) in own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer).
Supreme divine blessing of the Holy Trinity; exceptional spiritual authority and cosmic connection.
Benefics in specific houses from 2nd and 12th lords, or from 7th/Lagna lords.
Transforms adversity into advantage; overcomes enemies and emerges stronger.
6th lord in 6th, 8th, or 12th house (Dusthana in Dusthana).
Indra-like power; commands armies, organizations, or large enterprises.
5th and 11th lords in mutual Kendras with benefic Mars.
Mental lethargy, dullness, or depressive tendencies; active lifestyle and stimulation help.
Moon aspected by Saturn with no benefic influence.
Early loss of paternal influence; individual must develop self-reliance from a young age.
Specific Sun afflictions indicating early paternal loss.
Premature aging, old-age hardships, or decline in vitality in later years.
Lagna lord and 7th lord afflicted with Saturn\'s influence.
Children born very late in life; delayed parenthood with associated challenges.
5th lord connected to Saturn with late-activation Dasha.
Victory over competitors; triumphs in competitive and legal matters.
Bold determination and authority through sheer willpower.
4th lord and Jupiter in mutual Kendras, Lagna lord strong.
Treasure of arts and learning; mastery in fine arts, music, and cultural accomplishments.
Jupiter in 2nd or 5th aspected by Mercury and Venus.
Children arrive at a specific, astrologically favorable time period.
5th lord activated in specific Dasha timing (var. 1).
Timing of childbirth linked to planetary periods; children during favorable dashas.
5th lord activated in specific Dasha timing (var. 2).
Loss of child during specific adverse planetary period.
5th lord afflicted during specific malefic Dasha (var. 1).
Child-related sorrow linked to timing of malefic planetary periods.
5th lord afflicted during specific malefic Dasha (var. 2).
Wealth through marriage, business partnerships, or spouse\'s earnings.
Sexual dysfunction or reproductive challenges; medical consultation recommended.
Venus severely afflicted with 7th lord in debilitation.
Suggests inclination toward cunning behavior; cultivating transparency is advised.
Specific malefic combinations indicating deceptive tendencies (var. 1).
Indicates potential for manipulative behavior; moral discipline can mitigate this.
Specific malefic combinations indicating deceptive tendencies (var. 2).
Suggests propensity for duplicity; integrity practices and self-awareness recommended.
Specific malefic combinations indicating deceptive tendencies (var. 3).
Risk of hand/arm injuries or surgical procedures involving limbs.
Mars and Saturn afflicting 3rd house and Lagna severely.
Indicates emotional loneliness, financial fluctuations, and struggles despite inherent capabilities.
No planets in 2nd or 12th from Moon (Moon isolated).
Suggests harsh or uncultured demeanor; refinement in social interactions needed.
Lagna lord functionally malefic with Saturn\'s aspect or conjunction.
Thin, emaciated physique; difficulty gaining weight or maintaining vitality.
Saturn afflicting Lagna and Moon with no Jupiter aspect.
Susceptibility to wasting diseases or consumption; respiratory health monitoring advised.
Malefics in Lagna/6th with Moon and Mercury weakened.
Tortoise-like patience and enduring wisdom; famous, virtuous, and supportive of others.
Benefics in 5th/6th/7th with specific dignity conditions.
Vulnerability to severe skin diseases; dermatological monitoring essential.
Specific malefic combinations affecting skin houses (var. 1).
Chronic skin afflictions requiring sustained treatment and care.
Specific malefic combinations affecting skin houses (var. 2).
Pure, flower-like character; the individual radiates grace, beauty, and spiritual purity.
Venus in Lagna, Moon in Kendra, Jupiter and Saturn in Trikonas.
Grants abundant wealth, divine grace, and all-round prosperity blessed by Goddess Lakshmi.
9th lord in Kendra in own/exalted sign, Lagna lord strong.
Indicates wealth accumulation during mid-life (30-55 years).
Wealth significators activate during middle-age Dasha periods.
Exceptional fortune and great destiny; the individual leads a remarkably blessed life.
Male: day birth, Sun/Moon/Lagna in odd signs. Female: night birth, all in even signs.
Crown-like authority; heads institutions or governs with distinction.
Jupiter in 9th/10th with Lagna lord exalted.
Grants artistic talents, material prosperity, refined tastes, strong family bonds, and success in creative fields.
Venus in a Kendra (1/4/7/10) in own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces).
Garland of planetary blessings; outcomes depend on the starting house of the chain.
Seven or more planets in continuous houses forming a garland pattern.
Wind-like speed in learning; absorbs knowledge rapidly across diverse disciplines.
Jupiter in Kendra from Venus, Moon in Trikona, benefics on 5th.
Mental confusion or erratic thinking; mental discipline and stability routines advised.
Moon afflicted by Saturn with Rahu in specific positions (var. 1).
Impulsive thinking and poor judgment; anger management and reflective practices help.
Moon afflicted by Mars with Rahu in specific positions (var. 2).
Communication disorders or learning difficulties; early intervention recommended.
Mercury afflicted by malefics, no benefic aspects (var. 3).
Potential for severe mental health challenges; professional care essential.
5th lord debilitated with malefic aspects on Moon (var. 4).
Suggests tension with the mother; the maternal relationship requires conscious healing.
Malefic influences on 4th house and Moon creating adversarial dynamics.
Indicates a deep, loving relationship with the mother and unwavering maternal support.
4th lord well-placed with benefic influences on maternal indicators.
Long life for mother; individual enjoys extended maternal presence and support.
4th lord strong with benefic aspects, Moon well-placed (var. 1).
Maternal longevity and nurturing family environment confirmed.
Venus and Moon supportive, 4th house protected (var. 2).
Unhealthy or inappropriate attachment patterns in maternal relationships.
Venus and 4th lord in specific taboo combinations.
Wealth through maternal inheritance, real estate, or homeland connections.
4th lord connected to 2nd and 11th with benefic support.
Early loss of mother or severe maternal health crisis.
4th lord and Moon severely afflicted by malefics (var. 1).
Mother faces life-threatening circumstances; maternal welfare at risk.
Mars and Saturn afflicting 4th house and Moon (var. 2).
Mother\'s curse affecting progeny; unresolved maternal karma impacts children.
Moon afflicted with 5th lord in malefic combinations.
Deep, ocean-like wisdom and spiritual knowledge; learned, compassionate, widely traveled.
Malefics in Lagna/9th, benefics in 5th, mixture in 4th/8th.
Speech impediments or communication difficulties; therapy and remedies may help.
Mercury severely afflicted, 2nd lord debilitated with malefics.
Supreme royal status like a ceremonial drum; fame resounds across the land.
Lagna lord strong, all planets in Kendras/Trikonas.
Half-moon formation; army commander, physically strong, attractive, and wealthy.
All planets in seven successive houses from a Kendra.
Lunar formation; pleasing appearance, commanding stature, royal advisors.
All planets in upper half of zodiac (7th-12th houses).
Bow formation; truthful, guards treasure, happiness in early and late life.
All planets in houses 10-4 (10th to 4th span).
Umbrella formation; protector of others, helpful to all, comfortable old age.
All planets in houses 7-1 (7th to 1st span).
Lightning formation; generous, helpful, wealthy, and philanthropic nature.
All planets in six successive houses.
Staff formation; loss of family or isolation; service-oriented life.
Planets in four consecutive houses starting from 10th.
Mace-like strength; wealth through rituals, religious activities, or traditional pursuits.
Planets in two successive Kendra houses.
Sphere formation; poor, dirty, ignorant, but strong and wandering nature.
All planets in one single house.
Agricultural prosperity; hard-working nature with middle-class comforts.
Planets in houses other than Kendras, forming plow shape.
Arrow formation; connected to military, police, or prison administration.
Planets in four consecutive houses starting from 4th.
Lotus formation; enduring fame, virtuous life, and hundred years of prosperity.
All planets in four Kendra houses (1/4/7/10).
Field formation; agricultural wealth, helpful to many, truthful character.
All planets in five successive houses.
Fortress formation; liar or diplomat, connected to prisons or confinement roles.
Garland formation; comfortable life with vehicles, property, and lasting happiness.
Planets in three successive Trikonas (1-5-9, 2-6-10, or 3-7-11).
Firm resolve, fame, and wealth; steady, determined character.
All planets in fixed signs (Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius).
Versatile, skilled in many fields; handsome appearance with fluctuating fortune.
All planets in dual signs (Gemini, Virgo, Sagittarius, Pisces).
Boat formation; wealth through water-related pursuits, fame on seas.
All planets in houses 1-7 (one half of zodiac).
Noose formation; entangled in difficulties, imprisoned, or servant-like existence.
Planets only in specific bound patterns.
Love of travel, wandering nature; success through mobility and adaptability.
All planets in movable signs (Aries, Cancer, Libra, Capricorn).
Ocean formation; wealthy, many pleasures, equal to a king in enjoyment.
Planets evenly distributed in all Kendra groups.
Misery, poverty, and serpent-like suffering; dependent on others for livelihood.
All planets in cardinal houses (4th/8th/12th from Lagna).
Cart-like life — ups and downs; wealth followed by poverty in cycles.
Spear formation; lazy disposition but gains wealth through perseverance.
Planets in four consecutive houses starting from 7th.
Peak formation; contentment, philanthropy, and amiable disposition.
Trident formation; sharp, valorous, but poor; illness-prone and confrontational.
Diamond-like brilliance; handsome, happy in youth and old age, martial valor.
Well formation; wealth accumulation, hoarding tendency, lasting fortune.
Lute formation; lover of music, dance, and arts; skilled and happy disposition.
All seven planets in seven successive houses.
Bird-like freedom; ambassador nature, wandering, and message-carrying roles.
Barley-grain pattern; charitable nature, happiness in middle age.
Yoke formation; heretical, poor, outcast tendencies; unconventional path.
All planets in two successive houses.
Sacrificial post; generous, learned, religious, and focused disposition.
Planets in four consecutive houses starting from Lagna.
Susceptibility to eye problems or vision impairment; regular eye care essential.
2nd/12th lords afflicted by malefics, Sun/Moon weakened.
Grants transparent, guileless nature; naturally honest and earns respect through integrity.
Bestows straightforward character and moral purity; thrives through honest dealings.
Indicates tendency toward harsh speech; mindful communication advised.
Bestows eloquence, handsome appearance, royal bearing, and distinction in life.
Planets (excl. Moon/Rahu/Ketu) in both 2nd and 12th from Sun.
Grants exceptional courage, physical strength, and adventurous spirit in pursuits requiring bravery.
3rd lord in benefic Navamsa with benefic influences; Mars in favorable dignity.
Depends on others for food; financial constraints force reliance on charity or patronage.
2nd lord weak, 6th lord influencing food houses.
Natural wit, humor, and entertaining personality; brings joy to social gatherings.
Benefics in specific houses creating humorous disposition.
Gradual but unstoppable rise to authority through merit and perseverance.
Lagna lord\'s dispositor chain leads to planet in own/exalted in Kendra/Trikona.
Mountain-like career stability, wealth, fame, and generosity.
Benefics in Kendras; 6th and 8th houses empty/unafflicted.
Chronic sinusitis, nasal disorders, or respiratory allergies.
Moon and 4th lord afflicted by Saturn and Rahu.
Psychological disturbances or irrational fears; mental wellness practices provide relief.
Rahu/Ketu conjunct Moon or Lagna lord with no benefic relief.
Father\'s curse affecting progeny; unresolved paternal karma impacts children.
Sun afflicted with 5th lord in malefic combinations.
Susceptibility to Pitta-related ailments (inflammation, acidity, liver issues).
Sun and Mars afflicting Lagna/6th with fire-element imbalance.
Ancestral spirit affliction affecting family; spiritual cleansing recommended.
Saturn and Rahu afflicting 5th with no benefic aspects.
Grants abundant prosperity, sweet speech, fame, and royal honor.
Lagna lord conjunct Moon, aspected by strong Lagna dispositor.
Deep happiness and satisfaction through children; strong parent-child bond.
5th lord and Jupiter in mutual Kendra with benefic aspects.
Challenges in having children and maintaining marriage; extra effort in relationships needed.
5th and 7th lords severely afflicted in Dusthana.
Wealth through children, creative endeavors, or speculative gains.
Confers kingly status, authority, and rise to positions of great power.
Political success and administrative authority through intelligence.
Lagna lord and 5th lord in mutual Kendra with benefic aspects.
Fortune aligns with career for spectacular professional success.
9th and 10th lords in conjunction or mutual aspect (Dharma-Karma Adhipati).
Rise to power through structural advantages and systemic support.
Kendra and Trikona lords in mutual exchange (Parivarthana).
Comprehensive authority — leads with wisdom, ethics, and popular support.
Career excellence and highest professional distinctions.
Sustained authority and progressive career growth throughout life.
Multiple Kendra lords in Trikonas or vice versa.
Powerful self-made leader; identity inseparable from achievements.
Lagna lord in 10th, 10th lord in Lagna (exchange).
Authority through divine favor, past-life merit, and intellectual superiority.
5th lord in 9th or 9th lord in 5th with benefic aspects.
Benevolent leadership, diplomatic success, and cultural authority.
Jupiter and Venus in Kendras with strong Lagna lord.
Authority rooted in popular support, property, and institutional power.
4th and 10th lords in mutual support with strong dignity.
Governmental authority, administrative success, and public leadership.
Sun strong in 10th with Jupiter\'s aspect.
Popular leadership — loved by masses and rises through public support.
Moon strong, connected to multiple Kendra/Trikona lords.
Mars in own/exalted sign in Kendra with 10th lord.
Authority in intellectual, commercial, or communication fields.
Mercury strong in 10th connected to 2nd and 11th lords.
Lasting authority through disciplined governance and institutional leadership.
Saturn in own/exalted in 10th with benefic aspects.
Success in diplomacy, arts, or luxury industries with authority.
Venus in 10th connected to 9th and Lagna lords.
All-round professional success with authority, wealth, and recognition.
Multiple benefics in Kendras with dignified 10th lord.
Supreme Raja Yoga — extraordinary power and lasting legacy.
All Trikona and Kendra lords mutually supportive (rare).
Cancels Raja Yoga effects; success undermined by hidden adversaries.
Raja Yoga planets afflicted by strong malefics (var. 1).
Destroys career progress; external forces derail professional advancement.
Raja Yoga planets debilitated or combust (var. 2).
Fall from high position; sudden loss of authority or public disgrace.
Aroodha Lagna lord and Aroodha 12th lord in conjunction.
Bestows noble bearing, aristocratic demeanor, and natural leadership qualities.
Strong planets in Ascendant or Kendras with specific dignity conditions.
Solar authority — shines in public life and government with confidence.
Sun in 10th in own/exalted, 9th lord strong.
Chronic disease susceptibility; individual prone to recurring health issues.
6th lord strong, Lagna lord weak, malefics aspecting Lagna.
Grants courage, physical vitality, commanding presence, and success in competitive or military fields.
Mars in a Kendra (1/4/7/10) in own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation (Capricorn).
Career involving constant travel — diplomacy, consulting, or international business.
10th lord in movable sign connected to 3rd/7th/12th houses.
Inappropriate dynamics in sibling relationships requiring conscious boundaries.
3rd lord and Venus in afflicted combinations.
Fluctuating fortune — prosperity alternates with setbacks; stability requires effort.
Collective tragedy or mass-incident vulnerability; caution during malefic transits.
Specific malefic groupings in death-inflicting houses (var. 1).
Risk during group activities or travel; heightened awareness during danger periods.
Specific malefic groupings in death-inflicting houses (var. 2).
Conch-like royal authority; wealth, longevity, and humanitarian leadership.
5th and 6th lords in mutual Kendras with strong Lagna lord.
Grants fearlessness and longevity; conquers hidden dangers through resilience.
8th lord in 6th, 8th, or 12th house (Dusthana in Dusthana).
Physical comfort, good health, and robust constitution throughout life.
Lagna lord in own/exalted sign with benefic aspects on Lagna.
Susceptibility to snake bites or reptile-related dangers; caution near serpents.
Rahu in specific positions with malefic aspects on Lagna.
Serpent curse affecting progeny; karmic obstacles to childbearing.
Rahu in 5th with malefic aspects, no benefic relief (var. 1).
Ancestral karmic debt manifesting as fertility challenges.
Rahu/Ketu axis on 5th-11th with afflicted 5th lord (var. 2).
Deep-rooted karmic blocks to having children; spiritual remedies essential.
Specific Rahu combinations in 5th with Saturn (var. 3).
Severe serpent curse impact on family lineage; ritual purification recommended.
Confers discipline, leadership in governance, and success through perseverance and methodical effort.
Saturn in a Kendra (1/4/7/10) in own sign (Capricorn/Aquarius) or exaltation (Libra).
Noble, virtuous spouse and harmonious marriage; life partner brings fortune and happiness.
7th lord well-placed with Venus strong and benefic aspects.
Grants deep love for sacred knowledge, philosophical learning, and higher wisdom.
3rd house aspected by benefics, 3rd lord in benefic Navamsa with natural benefic aspects.
Wealth through defeating competition, legal victories, or service income.
Risk of head injuries or severe trauma; protective measures and caution advised.
Mars and Ketu afflicting Lagna with no benefic protection.
Genital or reproductive health disorders; specialized medical attention advisable.
Venus and 7th lord afflicted by malefics in 8th house.
Lord Shiva\'s blessing; profound meditative abilities, ascetic wisdom, and transformative spiritual power.
5th lord in 9th, 9th lord in 10th, 10th lord in 5th.
Eats food intended for rituals or ceremonies; dependent on funeral/ritual offerings.
Specific afflictions to 2nd house indicating impure food sources.
Bestows divine favor, prosperity after marriage, and fortune through partnerships.
7th lord exalted in 10th, 9th and 10th lords in conjunction.
Attractive face and pleasant appearance; magnetic personality and charming demeanor.
Benefics in 2nd from Lagna, Lagna lord strong (var. 1).
Handsome features and graceful bearing; naturally appealing and socially admired.
Venus and Jupiter aspecting Lagna or 2nd house (var. 2).
Grants self-earned wealth, intelligence, and prosperity through personal merit.
Planet (excl. Sun/Rahu/Ketu) in 2nd house from Moon.
Blessed with a worthy, virtuous child who brings great pride and family honor.
Jupiter strong aspecting 5th house, 5th lord dignified.
Grants wealth entirely through self-effort; the individual is a self-made achiever.
Lagna lord and 2nd lord strong without external house dependence.
Susceptibility to chronic skin conditions; holistic health practices recommended.
Specific combinations affecting skin and vitality houses.
Razor-sharp intelligence and quick comprehension; excels in logic and analytics.
Mercury exalted/own sign in Kendra with Jupiter\'s aspect.
Prophetic intuition and extraordinary foresight; uncanny predictive abilities.
Jupiter strong in Navamsa with specific Lagna connections.
Grants immense wealth, fearlessness, and a commanding, prosperous presence.
Sun, Moon, and Mars in mutual trines (1-5-9 triangle).
Grants ownership of excellent homes; individual lives in comfort with fine dwellings.
4th lord strong in Kendra/Trikona with benefic influences.
Grants fine vehicles, conveyances, and luxury transportation.
4th lord connected with benefics and Venus strong (var. 1).
Ensures premium vehicles and comfortable travel throughout life.
Benefics in 4th house with Venus well-placed (var. 2).
Speech defects, stammering, or language impediments; speech therapy beneficial.
Mercury severely afflicted with malefics, 2nd lord weak.
Challenges in continuing family lineage; alternative family building may be considered.
Suggests vulnerability to deception or theft; caution in trusting others advised.
Malefic influences on Lagna lord with Rahu/Ketu involvement.
Grants charitable disposition, influence, good fortune, and social standing.
Planet (excl. Moon/Rahu/Ketu) in 12th house from Sun.
Ensures steady wealth accumulation and financial stability through consistent effort.
Benefics in Upachaya houses (3/6/10/11) from Moon or Ascendant.
Susceptibility to Vata-related ailments (joint pain, nervous disorders, gas).
Saturn afflicting Lagna/6th house with wind-element imbalance.
Enhances truthfulness, industrious nature, and credibility through honest effort.
Planet (excl. Moon/Rahu/Ketu) in 2nd house from Sun.
Bestows palatial residences and ownership of remarkable properties.
Multiple planets supporting 4th house with dignified positions.
Lightning-like brilliance; sudden, spectacular professional success.
Venus as 11th lord conjunct Lagna lord in exalted Navamsa.

Reduces losses and waste; individual achieves independence through detachment.

Mars in 6th/8th afflicting Lagna with Ketu involvement.
Bestows strategic prowess in warfare, debate, or competitive professions.
Navamsa lord of 3rd lord traced through chain ending in planet in own Vargas.
Indicates resilience after setbacks — the individual recovers with tenacity from defeats.
3rd lord in fixed signs in D1 and D9, cruel D60, Rasi lord debilitated.
Grants unwavering determination and mental fortitude before undertaking challenges.
3rd lord exalted, conjoined with malefics in movable sign.

Your subscription is now active. Enjoy your premium features!
Destiny Matching™ looks beyond surface-level compatibility.
While many astrology apps focus on pointing out mismatches, Destiny examines how two charts interact, where differences show up, and how alignment can be found even when things feel misaligned.
It uses astrology to help you understand and navigate relationships in context, not simply label them as good or bad.
Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
Unlimited access is subject to fair use.
Purchases are billed through your Apple ID. Manage in Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions.
Choose how birth charts are displayed
This affects how birth charts are displayed in compatibility analysis.
Diamond layout, houses fixed, signs rotate
Grid layout, signs fixed, houses rotate
Select a year to view transits
Select a year to view dasha periods

Destiny is a personal space to understand patterns in your life. It helps you navigate love, work, and friendships, and think things through in the moment, using astrology as the language to add context.

With billions of astrological combinations, finding the right insight is like finding one key that fits in a barrel full of keys. Destiny uses a proprietary algorithm, developed over 12+ years and powered by AI, to translate your birth details into clearer, more personal guidance for everyday life.
Real-time astrology insights for your questions
Personalized insights that improve over time
Match birth charts with a partner to explore relationship and marriage potential
Get notified on favorable days based on your chart and preferences
Hello %1$s! I\'m Destiny, your personal astrology guide. What would you like to know about your day, relationships, or path ahead?
Today\'s forecast mentions: \'%@\' for my %@. Can you elaborate on what this means for me?

I am currently in my %@ Dasha period, which carries a theme of \'%@\' with a \'%@\' overall quality.%@

%@ is currently transiting through %@ in my %dth house. The key indication is: \'%@\'.

Aadi-Aadi: Classical texts indicate concern for husband\'s health
Madhya-Madhya: Classical texts indicate concern for both partners
Antya-Antya: Classical texts indicate concern for wife\'s health
Vata — Air & Ether: Movement, creativity, nervous system
Pitta — Fire & Water: Metabolism, digestion, intellect
Kapha — Water & Earth: Structure, immunity, stability
6/8: Classical texts warn of health risks and accidents
5/9: Classical texts indicate concern for progeny
Caution: This pair carries a classical widowhood advisory
Nav Pancham: Bride 5th from groom — traditionally auspicious for progeny
Dev-Rakshash: Classical texts warn of inimical relations and lifelong strife
Manushya-Rakshash: Classical texts warn of extreme misery for the Manushya partner
Graha Maitri represents mental compatibility based on Moon sign lords
Intensely Inimical (0/4) — one of 7 forbidden animal pairs
Yoni Koota represents physical/sexual compatibility based on animal nature
High — Vadha positions indicate severe classical warnings
Medium — Vipat/Pratyak positions indicate moderate challenges
Tara Koota represents health and fortune compatibility based on nakshatra positions
High — No magnetic pull, power struggles indicated
Medium — Bhaksha food relationship with imbalance
Vashya Koota represents mutual attraction and control dynamics
Low — Mildest Dosha in Ashtakoot (1/36 points)
Varna Koota represents spiritual and psychological compatibility based on Moon sign elements
Traditional complementary pair — natural affinity recognized

No Mangal Dosha detected in either chart.
Since neither partner is \'Manglik\', there is no risk of Mars-related conflicts affecting the marriage. This aspect contributes significantly to long-term peace.
Any potential negative effects are neutralized.
Both partners\' Mangal Dosha is at the same level, causing mutual neutralisation.
Mangal Dosha is effective and may cause friction.
Vedic astrology recognises planetary conditions that reduce or neutralise Mangal Dosha. Below are the exceptions found in each chart.
The Mangal Dosha has been neutralized by classical exceptions

Scoring %@/36 puts this match in the excellent tier. This is rare — a natural synergy between two people at the highest level of compatibility.
At %@/36 this is a very good match, well above average. Strong core compatibility with minor friction areas.
A score of %@/36 reflects a good match. Compatible in the most important areas, with some differences to navigate.
This match scores %@/36, which is in the average range. There is compatibility to work with, but some areas will need conscious effort.
At %@/36, this match faces notable challenges. While love can bridge many things, awareness of the friction areas will matter.
Scoring %@/36 indicates significant incompatibilities in key areas. This does not mean the relationship cannot work, but it will require genuine effort from both partners.
Responses with key astrological details such as planets and transits.
Responses with full planetary positions, degrees, house placements, and classical references.

This is not the best time to switch. Saturn is putting pressure on your career house right now, making transitions harder than usual.
Better window: April to June 2027, when Jupiter supports your career house.
Until then: Build skills, grow your network.

This is not the best time to switch. Saturn (retrograde, 8° Pisces) is transiting your 10th house. Your 10th-lord Mars (14° Gemini) is in the 3rd house.
Better window: Jupiter transits your 10th house from April 2027, conjunct natal Midheaven at 12° Aries.
Until then: Use this period for strategic positioning.
